name: Pickleballist - The Manor
description:
At Pickleballist, located in Highland, UT, we offer a full-service pickleball experience to Utah and Salt Lake County locals!

Our pro shop provides a wide selection of pickleball products, including pickleball paddles, balls, bags, grips, and accessories, available for purchase both in-store and online at https://pickleballist.com

Customers can try out paddles from our extensive demo collection before buying, ensuring the perfect fit with help from our resident PPR Certified Pickleball Pro.

In addition to product sales, we offer court rentals on our two dedicated outdoor courts, Titan ball machine rentals, and personalized lessons from certified pros.

Our services also include private and group lessons, paddle fitting consultations, and match play mentoring (Coach & Play) sessions. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned player, we have everything you need to elevate your game.

Book your session or browse our offerings at Pickleballist today!
open_play_schedule:
The Pickleballist Pro Shop and The Manor pickleball court and equipment rentals are available based on the schedules outlined at https://reserve.pickleball.ist 

Typical hours for court rentals are 7am - 10pm, Monday to Saturday. If you're stopping by to purchase pickleball paddles or other equipment, please call ahead. We are generally available between 8am - 10pm, Mon-Sat.

🚘 Parking Info: Please park on 5600 W and enter via the northeast gate at 5612 W 10930 N, Highland, UT. If the gate is locked, call Jordan at 385-213-9133

 📍 Parking Map: https://pkbl.ist/park
fees:
Private — Court Rentals: $15/court/hour. Both courts can be booked simultaneously.

Titan Ball Machine Rental: $30 for one hour (includes court rental) or $50 for two hours.

Private Paddle Fitting/De
